SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.organizer

Class EnrolledFragment

java.lang.Object
androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EnrolledFragment
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class EnrolledFragment extends androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
Fragment displaying the list of entrants who have enrolled for an event.

Shows all entrants with status "Enrolled". Uses a real-time snapshot listener so the list updates automatically when an entrant accepts an invite. Provides CSV export functionality (US 02.06.03, US 02.06.05).

Profile data (name, email, phone) is always fetched from the profiles/{deviceId} collection, because the waitingList sub-collection stores null for these fields.

      Returns:

    • fetchEnrolledEntrants

      private void fetchEnrolledEntrants()
      Fetches all entrants with status "Enrolled" from Firestore using a real-time snapshot listener. Profile data is loaded via loadProfileInfo() rather than directly from the waitingList document. Implements US 02.06.03.

    • notifyEnrolledEntrants

      private void notifyEnrolledEntrants()
      Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Enrolled". US 02.07.02 — Organizer sends notifications to all selected entrants.

    • loadProfileInfo

      private void loadProfileInfo(String deviceId, int index)
      Fetches profile data for a single enrolled entrant from the profiles collection.

      Profile fields (name, email, phone) are read from profiles/{deviceId} rather than from the waitingList document, because the teammate's join code writes null for these fields.

      Two stale-callback safety checks are applied in both success and failure listeners:

      1. Bounds check: index < 0 || index >= enrolledEntrants.size()
      2. Identity check: the deviceId at the index must still match
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant
      index - the index in enrolledEntrants for this entrant

    • previewAndExportCSV

      private void previewAndExportCSV()
      Builds a CSV string of enrolled entrants and shows a preview dialog before sharing. Implements US 02.06.05.

    • shareCSVFile

      private void shareCSVFile(String csvContent)
      Writes CSV content to a temporary file and triggers the Android share sheet.
      Parameters:
      csvContent - the CSV string to write and share
